prompt: A highly detailed, photorealistic commercial poster. In the center, 1 large {argument name="central food item" default="Zongzi (sticky rice dumpling wrapped in glossy green bamboo leaves and tied securely with twine)"} floating magically in mid-air. The background features traditional Chinese red wooden double doors with rows of golden studs and 2 ornate golden lion-head door knockers, slightly out of focus. Floating around the center are various ingredients: on the bottom left, 1 halved salted duck egg with a rich, oozing orange yolk; on the bottom right, 1 small square wooden tray overflowing with dark red beans, and 1 whole, translucent orange salted egg yolk floating nearby. Several small red beans and glowing embers are suspended in the air. Above the central item, large, stylized golden calligraphy text reading "{argument name="top greeting text" default="端午安康"}" formed from magical, swirling golden smoke rising upward. At the very bottom, bold, metallic golden serif text reading "{argument name="bottom promotional text" default="满99减20"}". Cinematic lighting, rich red and gold color palette, festive and magical atmosphere, high-end food photography style.
translatedPrompt: 一张细节丰富、照片级的商业海报。画面中央，1 个巨大的 {argument name="central food item" default="粽子（用油亮的绿竹叶包裹并用麻绳紧紧捆扎）"} 在半空中魔幻地悬浮。背景是传统的中国红色木质双开门，门上排列着金色门钉，还有 2 个装饰华丽的金色狮头门环，背景略微虚焦。中央周围悬浮着各种食材：左下角是 1 个切开的咸鸭蛋，露出浓郁流油的橙色蛋黄；右下角是 1 个装满深红色红豆的小方木托盘，旁边悬浮着 1 个完整的半透明橙色咸蛋黄。几颗小红豆和发光的余烬悬浮在空中。在中央主体上方，是由魔幻、缭绕的金色烟雾形成的巨大、风格化的金色书法文字“{argument name="top greeting text" default="端午安康"}”。最底部是醒目的金属质感金色衬线文字“{argument name="bottom promotional text" default="满 99 减 20"}”。电影级布光，浓郁的红金配色，节日且魔幻的氛围，高端食品摄影风格。

breakdown.creativeCore: 端午节促销海报：生成一张充满节日氛围、带有魔幻感的食品摄影海报，包含悬浮的食材和可自定义的促销文字。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 节日海报、城市印象、传统文化视觉、地域品牌

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
